code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
mut current = ""
mut token_idx = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
  let is_nl = b == 10
  if is_ws or is_nl
    if string.len(current) > 0
      if token_idx == 1
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          sum = sum + v
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      token_idx = token_idx + 1
      current = ""
    end
    if is_nl
      token_idx = 0
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if string.len(current) > 0
  if token_idx == 1
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      sum = sum + v
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end

println("sum=#{sum}")
